headline: Thomas Meunier
body: 🇧🇪 One year later, after having taken a wall from Lille... Sunderland did succeed in signing Thomas Meunier, officially a BlackCat now! ✅ SUFC Video Sacha Tavolieri (sachatavolieri) 🔴⚪️ Sunderland—who were already interested last summer, as noted below—are set to finalize the signing of Thomas Meunier in the coming hours. ⤵️ 🐈‍⬛✅ Meunier had a choice between this and an offer from Hull City, but he decided to opt for the Black Cats. mercato diablesrouges SUFC 👋 David_Ornstein —
raw_text:
🇧🇪 One year later, after having taken a wall from Lille... Sunderland did succeed in signing Thomas Meunier, officially a BlackCat now! ✅ #SUFC

Video
  




Sacha Tavolieri (@sachatavolieri)

🔴⚪️ Sunderland—who were already interested last summer, as noted below—are set to finalize the signing of Thomas Meunier in the coming hours. ⤵️

🐈‍⬛✅ Meunier had a choice between this and an offer from Hull City, but he decided to opt for the Black Cats. #mercato #diablesrouges #SUFC 👋 @David_Ornstein





— https://nitter.net/sachatavolieri/status/2076970795427897541#m
